name: Perrot Duval Holding S.A.
summary: Perrot Duval Holding S.A. provides automation technologies in the field of process automation worldwide. The company develops, produces, and sells original technological components and solutions. It supplies automated installations and components for dispensing and safety to simplify processes in manufacturing chemical products, such as paints, printing inks, textiles dyes, food, and cosmetics, as well as pharmaceutical products; and designs, develops, and sells original modular and standard dispensing systems to the manufacturers and users of offset inks. Perrot Duval Holding S.A. is based in Geneva, Switzerland.
